record.name: LINKTYPE_ARCNET_BSD
record.description: ARCNET Data Packets with BSD encapsulation

record.name: LINKTYPE_ATM_CLIP
record.description: ATM Classical IP, with no header preceding IP

record.name: LINKTYPE_IEEE802_11_PRISM
record.description: IEEE 802.11 wireless LAN, preceded by a Prism monitor mode header

record.name: LINKTYPE_IP_OVER_FC
record.description: IP and ATM over Fibre Channel

record.name: LINKTYPE_SUNATM
record.description: ATM traffic captured from a SunATM device

record.name: LINKTYPE_IEEE802_11_RADIOTAP
record.description: IEEE 802.11 wireless LAN, preceded by a Radiotap header

record.name: LINKTYPE_ARCNET_LINUX
record.description: ARCNET Data Packets with Linux encapsulation

record.name: LINKTYPE_MTP2_WITH_PHDR
record.description: SS7 MTP2 frames, with a pseudo-header

record.name: LINKTYPE_IEEE802_11_AVS
record.description: IEEE 802.11 wireless LAN, preceded by an AVS header

record.name: LINKTYPE_PPP_PPPD
record.description: PPP preceded by a direction octet and an HDLC-like control field

record.name: LINKTYPE_GPRS_LLC
record.description: General Packet Radio Service Logical Link Control, as per 3GPP TS 04.64

record.name: LINKTYPE_BLUETOOTH_HCI_H4
record.description: Bluetooth HCI UART Transport Layer packets

record.name: LINKTYPE_USB_LINUX
record.description: USB packets, beginning with a Linux USB header

record.name: LINKTYPE_IEEE802_15_4_LINUX
record.description: IEEE 802.15.4 with address fields padded by Linux

record.name: LINKTYPE_PPI
record.description: Per-Packet Information header preceding packet data

record.name: LINKTYPE_IEEE802_16_MAC_CPS_RADIO
record.description: 802.16 MAC Common Part Sublayer plus radio header

record.name: LINKTYPE_SITA
record.description: Various link-layer types, with a pseudo-header

record.name: LINKTYPE_RAIF1
record.description: Ethernet packets captured from a u10 Networks board

record.name: LINKTYPE_IPMB_KONTRON
record.description: IPMB packet for IPMI, with a 2-octet header

record.name: LINKTYPE_BLUETOOTH_HCI_H4_WITH_PHDR
record.description: Bluetooth HCI UART Transport Layer packets with a direction pseudo-header

record.name: LINKTYPE_AX25_KISS
record.description: KISS frames between a host and an AX.25 TNC

record.name: LINKTYPE_C_HDLC_WITH_DIR
record.description: Cisco PPP with HDLC framing, with a direction header

record.name: LINKTYPE_FRELAY_WITH_DIR
record.description: Frame Relay LAPF, with a direction header

record.name: LINKTYPE_LAPB_WITH_DIR
record.description: X.25 LAPB, with a direction header

record.name: LINKTYPE_FLEXRAY
record.description: FlexRay frames or symbols, with a pseudo-header

record.name: LINKTYPE_LIN
record.description: Local Interconnect Network (LIN) automotive bus, with a metadata header

record.name: LINKTYPE_GSMTAP_UM
record.description: GSM Um interface, with gsmtap header

record.name: LINKTYPE_GSMTAP_ABIS
record.description: GSM Abis interface, with gsmtap header

record.name: LINKTYPE_MPLS
record.description: MPLS packets with MPLS label as the header

record.name: LINKTYPE_USB_LINUX_MMAPPED
record.description: USB packets, beginning with an extended Linux USB header

record.name: LINKTYPE_FC_2_WITH_FRAME_DELIMS
record.description: Fibre Channel FC-2 frames with SOF and EOF

record.name: LINKTYPE_CAN_SOCKETCAN
record.description: Controller Area Network (CAN) frames, with a metadata header

record.name: LINKTYPE_NFLOG
record.description: Linux netlink NETLINK NFLOG socket log messages

record.name: LINKTYPE_NETANALYZER_TRANSPARENT
record.description: Ethernet frames with netANALYZER pseudo-header, preamble, and SFD

record.name: LINKTYPE_NG40
record.description: Frames from ng4T GmbH's ng40 protocol tester

record.name: LINKTYPE_NFC_LLCP
record.description: NFC Logical Link Control Protocol frames, with a pseudo-header

record.name: LINKTYPE_SCTP
record.description: SCTP packets, with no lower-level protocols such as IPv4 or IPv6

record.name: LINKTYPE_USBPCAP
record.description: USB packets, beginning with a USBPcap header

record.name: LINKTYPE_RTAC_SERIAL
record.description: Serial-line packet from the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories RTAC product

record.name: LINKTYPE_BLUETOOTH_BREDR_BB
record.description: Bluetooth Basic Rate and Enhanced Data Rate baseband packets

record.name: LINKTYPE_ZWAVE_R1_R2
record.description: Z-Wave RF profile R1 and R2 packets

record.name: LINKTYPE_WATTSTOPPER_DLM
record.description: WattStopper Digital Lighting Management (DLM) and Legrand Nitoo Open protocol packets

record.name: LINKTYPE_USB_DARWIN
record.description: USB packets captured on a Darwin-based operating system (macOS, etc.)

record.name: LINKTYPE_LORATAP
record.description: LoRaWan packets with a LoRaTap pseudo-header

record.name: LINKTYPE_VSOCK
record.description: Protocol for communication between host and guest machines in VMware and KVM hypervisors

record.name: LINKTYPE_NORDIC_BLE
record.description: Messages to and from a Nordic Semiconductor nRF Sniffer for Bluetooth LE packets

record.name: LINKTYPE_DOCSIS31_XRA31
record.description: DOCSIS packets and bursts, preceded by a pseudo-header

record.name: LINKTYPE_EBHSCR
record.description: Elektrobit High Speed Capture and Replay (EBHSCR) format

record.name: LINKTYPE_VPP_DISPATCH
record.description: fd.io VPP graph dispatcher trace records

record.name: LINKTYPE_DSA_TAG_BRCM
record.description: Ethernet frames, with a Broadcom switch tag inserted

record.name: LINKTYPE_DSA_TAG_BRCM_PREPEND
record.description: Ethernet frames, with a Broadcom switch tag prepended

record.name: LINKTYPE_IEEE802_15_4_TAP
record.description: IEEE 802.15.4 with a tap header preceding it

record.name: LINKTYPE_DSA_TAG_DSA
record.description: Ethernet frames, with a Marvell DSA switch tag inserted

record.name: LINKTYPE_DSA_TAG_EDSA
record.description: Ethernet frames, with a Marvell EDSA switch tag inserted

record.name: LINKTYPE_Z_WAVE_SERIAL
record.description: Serial frames transmitted between a host and a Z-Wave chip over an RS-232 or USB serial connection

record.name: LINKTYPE_NETANALYZER_NG
record.description: Hilscher Gesellschaft fuer Systemautomation mbH netANALYZER NG hardware and software

record.name: LINKTYPE_ZBOSS_NCP
record.description: ZBOSS NCP Serial Protocol, with a pseudo-header

record.name: LINKTYPE_ZWAVE_TAP
record.description: Z-Wave packets, with a metadata header
